sections_cited: section 133 of the Income Tax Ordinance

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Income Tax Reference Application 136 of 2024 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on office objection 1. 2. For orders on CMA 1349/2024. 3. For hearing of Main Case. 04.12.2025 Messrs. Abdul Rahim Lakhani and Atta Mohammad Qureshi, advocates for the applicant. Mr. Mukesh Kumar Khatri, advocate for respondent No.1. Pursuant to order dated 23.10.2025, learned counsel for respondent No.1 states that it may be just and proper to set-aside the impugned order and remand the matter back for adjudication afresh to the learned Tribunal. Order accordingly. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 133 of the Income Tax Ordinance, 2001. Judge Judge M. Khan
